title: abutilon malacum
intro: Abutilon malacum, also known as Indian mallow or velvet leaf, is a plant species within the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Abutilon malacum is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Abutilon malacum include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
